descriptions.text: Spring Breeze is the first main game in Kirby Super Star and Kirby Super Star Ultra. It is essentially a simplified remake of Kirby's Dream Land, with some differences to compensate for this. It is the first main game to be playable, and is designed to introduce new players to the game.

1¹¹=1 (Power of Destiny) is the only studio album and the final release by the South Korean boy group Wanna One, released on November 19, 2018, by Swing Entertainment and Stone Music Entertainment. The album was the culmination of the group's activities before its disbandment in January 2019.
